title: RuntimeEventsNats
description: Global runtime event subjects shared by many deployments (idle-reaper, queue-consumer, mdp-optimizer, des-simulator, contracts-service, trading, webrtc-signaling, ai-ml-pipeline). Each publisher emits to dd.remote.events; the websocket bridge re-publishes to dd.remote.websocket.events.

subjects.name: RuntimeEvents
subjects.description: Generic runtime event bus. Every deployment publishes lifecycle, error, telemetry-style events here. The default for NATS_EVENT_SUBJECT across the codebase.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.events

subjects.name: RuntimeCriticalEvents
subjects.description: Critical operational event bus for compact alert-worthy runtime failures. JetStream-backed by DD_REMOTE_CRITICAL_EVENTS so dd-remote-queue-consumer can log/alert without losing events during restarts. Payloads should carry a dd.log.v1-compatible envelope and must not contain secrets.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.events.critical

subjects.name: WebsocketEvents
subjects.description: WebSocket event bridge used by gleamlang-server and gleamlang-ws-server. Defaults to NATS_PUBLISH_SUBJECT='dd.remote.websocket.events'.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.websocket.events

subjects.name: GitReposChanges
subjects.description: Coalesced fan-out of known_git_repos row changes derived from the WAL/CDC stream. Published by dd-remote-rest-api so downstream services (lambda runner, build pipeline) react to git-repo metadata edits without polling.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.git-repos.changes

queueGroups.name: CriticalEventsLoggerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Durable queue group used by dd-remote-queue-consumer replicas for critical runtime event logging and future alert fan-out.

streams.name: DD_REMOTE_CRITICAL_EVENTS
streams.description: Durable file-backed stream for alert-worthy runtime failures. Consumers log and alert from this stream; payloads must stay compact and redacted.
